headline: CBRE Data Center Sustainability Push Meets Valuation And Growth Questions
summary: CBRE Group (NYSE:CBRE) is set to feature on a panel at Data Centre LIVE: The London Summit, focusing on data center sustainability and renewables integration. The event highlights CBRE's role in addressing energy use, grid stability, and environmental impact as data center demand expands. For investors tracking real estate and infrastructure, CBRE Group's US$146.7 share price and 16.9% return over the past year frame this focus on data center sustainability as part of a broader story. The...
